summary: Set 045 Session 6 of 6 — UAT + change-log + cross-tier docs + dual-registry release. SET CLOSE-OUT SESSION. (1) CONTRIBUTING.md NEW at repo root — per-test-layer scope guidance (Layer 1 pytest, Layer 2 npm run test:unit, Layer 3 Playwright) + the rebuild-trap note that flagged S5 Round-A as deferred (invoke through `npm run test:playwright` not bare `npx playwright test` — Playwright loads dist/extension.js and a stale bundle silently produces assertion failures). Includes full-pass canonical commands + build + publish + CI matrix sections. (2) 045-log-harvest-implementation-uat-checklist.json NEW — 27 ad-hoc UAT scenarios across 6 functional areas (dabbler-launch wrapper, Joiner CLI, Narration templates, Explorer signal badges, Explorer conflict pills, Missing-dependency degradation, Documentation). Dual schema: `Passes`+`Feedback` (UAT Checklist Editor canonical) AND `Result:'pending'` (Dabbler extension parser's pending-count field) — bridges the schema gap between the two tools. (3) docs/session-sets/045-log-harvest-implementation/change-log.md NEW — Set 045 change-log. Header (status COMPLETE / created 2026-05-23 / cost / forecast / NTE), context (Set 044 dual-primary lock + Sets 037-041 + 042-043 cancellation), per-session shipped+verification blocks for S1-S6, cumulative routed spend table, what-did-not-ship deferred-items list. (4) docs/cross-repo-harvest-notice.md NEW — paste-in CLAUDE.md snippet for the three consumer repos (parallel structure to cross-repo-checkout-notice.md). Covers Option 1 wrapper launch + Option 2 narration template; missing-dependency setup gap; §7 redaction posture; canonical references. (5) Dual version bumps: tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/package.json 0.20.0→0.21.0; pyproject.toml dabbler-ai-router 0.7.0→0.8.0; tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/CHANGELOG.md [0.21.0] section under [Unreleased] (Added: harvest signal badges + conflict pills + HarvestService + missing-dependency setup warning + regenerateNarrationTemplates + RowPayload extensions; Documentation: CONTRIBUTING + cross-repo-harvest-notice + narration-templates + joiner-spec; Companion release; Notes); CLAUDE.md version-walk promoted 0.20.0→Previous + new 0.21.0 Current block. Pre-S6 operator decisions: of three S5-deferred Round-A recs, only CONTRIBUTING.md rebuild-trap note FOLDED IN; singleton HarvestService refactor DEFERRED (no current pain point); missing-events-ledger ConflictKind DEFERRED (audit-touching). Release posture: publish after VERIFIED Round A/B, operator-gated. Tests: pytest 811 passed/1 skipped (S5 baseline preserved); tsc clean; npm run test:unit 531 passing/2 pre-existing failures; Playwright 27 passed/2 skipped (harvest-signals 3/3 still passing). Step 6 verification VERIFIED Round A (gemini-pro, $0.068716, no must-fix); one nice-to-have on CONTRIBUTING.md (duplicate `cd tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration` across two commands → collapsed) applied in-flight per 'don't hide behind out-of-scope'. Releases (operator-gated after VERIFIED): dabbler-ai-router 0.8.0 to PyPI + DarndestDabbler.dabbler-ai-orchestration 0.21.0 to VS Code Marketplace. Set 045 cumulative routed: $0.024 (S1) + $0.053066 (S2) + $0.107 (S3) + $0.063 (S4) + $0.0707 (S5) + $0.068716 (S6) = $0.386482 of $5 NTE (~7.7% of ceiling). Set 045 CLOSED.
files_changed: CLAUDE.md (Extension versioning block — promoted 0.20.0 to Previous + added 0.21.0 Current)

reason.specifics: Set 045 is the final session of the log-harvest implementation roadmap stubbed at Set 044 / S5 close-out. No next session in this set. The next natural session set is **Set 046 (Explorer enrichment, audit-pending per memory project_044_log_discovery_runs_before_036)** which was scoped at Set 044 to capture the upside that cancelled Sets 042-043 were reaching for. Set 046 has not yet been spec'd; it should run an audit-then-spec pass before any implementation. Carry-forward inputs for whichever set runs next: (1) cumulative routed spend across Set 045 was $0.386482 of $5 NTE (~7.7%); per-session verifier-catch trend was steeply downward (S3 needed three rounds with five must-fix; S4/S5 needed one round each; S6 needed zero) — the discipline-improvement traces to the joiner-spec.md §5 schema lockdown + the per-session 'carry-forward inputs (locked, do not relitigate)' block at the top of each ai-assignment entry. Preserve those patterns for Set 046. (2) Three S5 deferred follow-ups remain available for future revisitation: singleton HarvestService refactor (Set 046 if a second consumer view emerges); missing-events-ledger ConflictKind (proper audit-then-implement set if real-world feedback wants it); Q1 bypass-rate fraction computation (post-2026-06-07 once the observation log has accumulated). (3) The Q3 phrasing-trigger ablation remains deferred post-release per pre-S5 decision; trip-wire is a real-world refusal of a v1.1 narration template against any orchestrator. (4) The dual-schema UAT checklist pattern (Passes+Feedback + Result) bridged a real schema gap between the UAT Checklist Editor and the Dabbler extension parser — worth reconciling in a future doc/extension session by either (a) extending the extension parser to recognize Passes/Feedback or (b) extending the editor to also emit Result. This recommendation is SELF-AUTHORED per the operator's standing in-session router restriction.
